chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P.No.D- 1679 of 2016 C.P.No.D- 3030 of 2016 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 28.05.2019. Mr. Muhammad Arshad S. Pathan, Advocate for petitioners in C.P.No.D- 1679/2016 and for respondents No.6 & 7 in C.P.No.D-3030/2016. Mr. Imtiaz Ali Channa, Advocate for petitioners in C.P.No.D-3030/2016. Mr. Allah Bachayo Soomro, Additional A.G. alongwith Lutufullah Buriro, AXEN Johi Irrigation Sub-Division at Dadu. = After hearing the parties at some length, we dispose of these petitions on the undertaking given by Mr. Lutufullah Buriro, AXEN Johi Irrigation Sub-Division at Dadu that irrigation authorities will provide water to the petitioners in both the connected petitions as per their share list without fail, which has satisfied both the learned counsel for petitioners and they seek disposal of these petitions in such terms. Accordingly, both the petitions stand disposed of alongwith pending applications, in the terms whereby the irrigation authorities shall provide water to the petitioners in both the petitions according to their share list without fail however, without installing any pipe illegally. Such compliance report shall be submitted to this court within a period of one month. JUDGE JUDGE Tufail/PA
